completion_criteria_checked: scripts/summarize-routing-log.ps1 adds the required review-trigger category breakdown using only mechanically exact mappings where exact attribution exists, and explicitly preserves ambiguity where exact attribution does not exist.

scripts/summarize-routing-log.ps1 adds a per-task_id breakdown and labels the resulting review/stop-touchpoint total as a proxy for system-detected review points rather than a literal count of owner chat interjections.

The script output explicitly states that repeated instruction frequency remains undelivered because no existing log signal captures chat-level instruction repetition and this task deliberately does not invent one.
No new log event type was added, and no script other than scripts/summarize-routing-log.ps1 was modified.
The updated script runs functionally against the real .cockpit/logs/routing-log.jsonl without crashing and preserves the existing legacy pre-event_type handling.
docs/DECISIONS.md records DECISION-073 for this change.
docs/BRR_PLAN.md includes the required Later update pointers in both the Phase 5 Readiness Review gap note and the DECISION-069 carried-forward backlog note.
No existing verdict, task safety class, Acceptance Boundary Rule, or schema was changed.
scripts/verify-handback-guardrails.ps1 was re-run independently by the verifier and completed cleanly for task_status returned_for_verification.
evidence_reviewed: Select-String output for DECISION-073 in docs/DECISIONS.md
scripts/verify-handback-guardrails.ps1 output re-run independently via pwsh -NoProfile -File
risks: Several newly added categories have no real historical examples yet in the current routing log, so those branches were verified by direct code review plus clean functional execution rather than by observed live examples for every category.

The stop_condition_fired sub-reason categorization is intentionally coupled to fixed wording emitted by scripts/check-stop-conditions.ps1; if that script's message text changes later, these counts may under-report until the reporting script is updated.
summary: Independent verification found the task complete within its bounded scope. The reporting script now delivers the required review-trigger categorization and per-task breakdown, explicitly labels the owner-interruption metric as a proxy, preserves the deliberate non-delivery of repeated instruction frequency, and runs cleanly against the real routing log while keeping legacy-format handling intact. The required decision and BRR plan amendments are present, and the verifier's independent guardrail pass completed cleanly.
next_action: Task complete; owner/advisor selects the next backlog item.
